basic_details.short_information: Bharatiya Beej Sahakari Samiti Limited (BBSSL) has officially announced the Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. The detailed notification has been released on its official website.Candidates who meet the age limit of up to 58 years and hold a Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management, or any allied discipline from a recognised University/Institution are eligible to apply for this position. age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 58 years. Relaxation in age may be considered for exceptionally qualified and experienced candidates at the discretion of the Competent Authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution.
qualification.details: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution.

selection_process: demonstrated leadership capability and personal interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BBSSL Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 58 years. Relaxation in age may be considered for exceptionally qualified and experienced candidates at the discretion of the Competent Authority.

rows.date: 15 (Fifteen) days from the date of publication of this advertisement. ie 15 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Evaluation of academic qualifications, relevant experience, demonstrated leadership capability and personal interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BBSSL Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) position is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 58 years. Age relaxation may be considered for exceptionally qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: You need to send your complete application along with required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only 1 vacancy for the post of Deputy Managing Director / Chief Operating Officer (COO).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an evaluation of academic qualifications, relevant experience, leadership capability, and a personal interaction.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the BBSSL located?
faq.answer: The BBSSL is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Can I find the official notification PDF online?
faq.answer: Yes, the official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article.
